nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: Blue-fronted lorikeet
nodes.summary: Blue-fronted lorikeet（Blue-fronted lorikeet，学名 Charmosynopsis toxopei），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The anecdotal character of their observation and very limited habitat, which is gradually shrinking due to logging, urged the International Union for Conservation of Nature to gradually elevate its status from threatened in 1988 to vulnerable in 1994 and critically endangered since 2000. The establishment of two protected areas on Buru, Gunung Kapalat Mada () and Waeapo (), partly aim at preserving the habitat of the blue-fronted lorikeet
